sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.5 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: Let$p$be a prime. Let$G$be a transitive subgroup of the group of finitary permutations$FSym( )$of a set$$, let$N$be a normal subgroup of$G$, and let$S$be a transitive Sylow$p$-subgroup of$G$. [r]{(a)} Is it true that$S N$is a Sylow$p$-subgroup of$N$? [r]{(b)} Is it true that$SN/N$is a Sylow$p$-subgroup of$G/N$? [r]{(c)} Are any two transitive Sylow$p$-subgroups of$G$locally conjugate in$G$? Two su...
